theme.archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Adapted for Indian Transport Market)
theme.mood: Premium, Fast, Reliable, Trustworthy, Uber-level Simplicity

rules: Use tracking-tight for all H1 and H2.
Headings should use font-bold or font-extrabold for a confident, solid feel.
Overlines/Labels (like 'TRUSTED BY', 'SERVICES') use uppercase, tracking-widest, text-xs.
Ensure body text has a comfortable reading line-height (leading-relaxed).

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Mobile-first density combined with expansive desktop layouts. Generous whitespace to convey a premium feel.
spacing_and_layout.container: Max-width 7xl (1280px) for most pages to ensure content isn't too stretched on ultra-wides.
spacing_and_layout.corners: Use rounded-xl or rounded-2xl for main cards to match modern tech aesthetics. Use rounded-full for primary action buttons/pills.
spacing_and_layout.borders: 1px subtle borders (border-slate-200) with soft shadow (shadow-sm) to lift surfaces slightly from the background.
spacing_and_layout.grid: Bento Grid strategy for the service tiles and dashboard widgets.

components.buttons: Primary buttons MUST be #FF7A00 with text-white. Secondary buttons are #0A2E6D with text-white. Always include hover states (brightness change or scale).
components.forms: Multi-step or clean single-step wizard style. Minimum height 48px (h-12) for mobile touch targets. distinct focus states (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#FF7A00]).
components.floating_actions: Fixed positioning (z-50). Floating AI Mic, AI Chat drawer toggle, and WhatsApp CTA. Use shadow-2xl and pulse animations.
components.service_tiles: Grid of 7 tiles (Car, Auto, Bike, Tempo, Bus, Porter, Goods). On hover: -translate-y-1, elevated shadow, border-brand_primary.
components.cards: Flat solid backgrounds. Avoid default Shadcn card if it feels boxy; customize with generous padding (p-6 or p-8) and subtle ring/border.

animations.page_transitions: Framer motion staggered fade-in and slide-up for grids and sections.
animations.micro_interactions: Hover states scale elements by 1.02. Active (click) states scale down to 0.98.
animations.ai_voice: When active, display a glowing pulse effect (#FF7A00/50) around the microphone button.

hero_background.description: Cinematic Indian city road twilight, navy and orange hues

abstract_speed.description: Abstract speed lines for AI sections

tempo_traveller.description: Tempo traveller in a scenic location

auto_rickshaw.description: Moving auto rickshaw on city street

cargo_truck.description: Cargo truck on a scenic highway

instructions_to_main_agent: Create the logo using text/HTML: Bold Navy 'RK' with an orange road/pin, 'pooja' wordmark below, and the tagline.
Ensure the hero section uses the deep navy background with the vivid orange accent for the primary Call to Action (CTA).
Build the 7 service tiles in a responsive grid. Car, Auto, Bike, Tempo Traveller, Bus Booking, Porter, Goods Transport.
Create a Multilingual picker modal (12 Indian languages) on first launch and switchable from the header.
Implement the sticky AI Floating action buttons (Voice, Chat, WhatsApp) - Mobile first.
Implement the Lead Scoring UI (Hot, Warm, Cold) in the Admin Dashboard.
Include a 'SAFE & RELIABLE | ON-TIME | 24x7 SUPPORT' trust strip.
All interactive elements MUST have `data-testid` attributes for testing.
Strictly follow the color palette. Embrace the Indian premium aesthetic. No purple/violet AI gradients.
